Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Raymundo Luna. Robert Eiselman for and with Ignacio Luna. Alec Harrington for and with Maria Luna.

Ms. Rasch stated that they would like to make a change to paragraph 9 in the order approving the settlement agreement to read "The Successor Trustee has no authority to sell, assign or forgive any debts owing to the Trust from Jorge Luna or Leticia Luna without prior Court order" and also stated that bond should be set at $300,000.00. Status on filing of bond was set for June 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the inventory and status on filing of Ignacio Luna's First and Final Account was set for August 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ignacio's accounting is to be filed August 12, 2013. Status on filing of Maria Luna's First Account was set for August 13, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Maria's accounting is to be filed August 6, 2014. The Petition to Determine Powers, Rights Duties of Trustee, etc. was taken off calendar. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Said order is to be prepared by Ms. Rasch. The Court will attach a copy of the settlement agreement to the order and will appoint a Probate Referee. Ms. Rasch is discharged as Counsel in the Trust and the Conservatorship matter subject to re-appointment. The hearing in the Conservatorhsip matter (296540) for general appointment on calendar for June 13, 2013 is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
